workLog.entry: Issue #2523 finding 1: invoke_markdown_auto_lint.py npx subprocess.run had no timeout; a cold npm cache or unreachable registry blocked every .md Write/Edit turn indefinitely. Added timeout=30 (CodeQL hook budget) plus a TimeoutExpired fail-open handler with a warning. Tests: test_timeout_returns_zero_with_warning and test_npx_call_carries_bounded_timeout.

Issue #2523 finding 2: invoke_session_validator.py docstring promises 'Exit Codes: 0 = Always (non-blocking hook)' but the lib bootstrap failure path did sys.exit(2). Aligned to exit 0 (matching sibling invoke_auto_retrospective.py). Test: TestBootstrapDegradesOnPartialInstall.test_missing_lib_exits_zero runs a copy of the hook without lib/ in a subprocess and asserts exit 0 with the diagnostic on stderr.

Issue #2523 finding 3: invoke_security_gate.py read_text() of every session log on each gated Edit/Write; a multi-MB log pushed past the hook timeout (fail-open). Replaced with line streaming per the invoke_false_completion_gate.py pattern. The invoke_security_commit_gate.py twin is intentionally deferred: that file is being modified in open PR #2535 and a parallel edit guarantees merge conflicts; follow up after #2535 merges.

Issue #2523 finding 4: invoke_plan_state_sync.py msvcrt.locking locked 1 byte at the current position (decorative). Now locks a fixed 0x7FFFFFFF-byte region anchored at offset 0, with position save/restore, in both acquire and release. Platform check switched from os.name=='nt' to sys.platform=='win32' so mypy narrows the Windows-only attrs. Windows branch remains pragma: no cover (no Windows CI leg); noted in PR.

Issue #2523 finding 5: invoke_adr_change_detection.py fallback used parents[2], correct only for the .claude/hooks/ layout; in the vendored src/<provider>/hooks/<event>/ copy it resolved inside src/ and ADR detection silently no-oped. Replaced with a walk-up to the first .git ancestor, returning None (fail-open) when absent. Regression tests: test_vendored_layout_walks_up_to_git_root and negative control test_no_git_ancestor_returns_none.

Collateral: regenerated the 5 copilot-cli hook mirrors via build_all.py; bumped plugin.json 0.5.167 -> 0.5.168; added pyproject ruff per-file-ignores for the generated mirror trees (content-identical to the #2532/#2535 exemption; trivially merge-resolvable). Fixed surfaced pre-existing mypy errors in the touched files (_lib_dir str|None annotation, bare dict type args). Verification: tests/hooks 1484 passed under capsh; ruff clean on changed files and mirrors; mypy 'no issues found in 5 source files'.

nextSteps: Open PR Fixes #2523 (base main; fix/2348 merged as PR #2530)
Follow-up: stream session logs in invoke_security_commit_gate.py after PR #2535 merges
